mission.title: kserve: feat: add CatBoost model format supported by MLServer runtime
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:

Adds support of `CatBoost` model format for `MlServer` runtime

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:

Fixes #1491

**Type of changes**

- [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] (_I am not sure it's required)_ This change requires a documentation update

**Feature/Issue validation/testing**:

Created `isvc` resource with provided model format and fake `storageUri`, just to verify that controller picked appropriate `ClusterServingRuntime`:

```sh
kubectl create namespace kitty

kubectl -n kitty apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1"
kind: "InferenceService"
metadata:
  name: catboost-example
spec:
  predictor:
    model:
      modelFormat:
        name: catboost
      protocolVersion: v2
      storageUri: "gs://kfserving-examples/models/sklearn/1.0/model"
EOF
```

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

Please let me know if:

1. I should write corresponding e2e test with appropriate image archive (I can
